sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61992" key="laruggo/fwnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾰρυγγό-φωνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n61992.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sounding from the throat</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1682.tlg001:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sopat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
